data.title: Eagle Royalties Ltd. Extends Warrant Expiry to Strengthen Financial Position
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Quickly and easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Eagle Royalties Ltd. ( (TSE:ER) ) has shared an announcement.

Eagle Royalties Ltd. has received approval from the Canadian Securities Exchange to extend the expiry date of 5,005,998 outstanding common share purchase warrants by an additional 12 months, moving the expiry to May 19, 2026, while maintaining the exercise price at $0.50 per warrant. This extension reflects the company’s strategic financial management and could potentially enhance its liquidity position, thereby impacting its operational capabilities and market positioning positively.

More about Eagle Royalties Ltd.

Eagle Royalties Ltd. operates in the natural resources industry, focusing on maintaining a strong treasury and holding a diverse portfolio of over 35 royalty interests in western Canada. The company targets a wide range of commodities, including critical metals, precious metals, industrial minerals, and diamonds. Its flagship royalty is associated with the AurMac Project in Yukon, operated by Banyan Gold Corp.

Average Trading Volume: 29,643

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

For detailed information about ER stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: American Express Reports Stable Loan Delinquency Rates
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Quickly and easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from American Express ( (AXP) ).

In a recent update, American Express reported delinquency and write-off statistics for its U.S. Consumer and U.S. Small Business Card Member lending portfolios for February, March, and April 2025. The statistics showed stable delinquency rates at 1.4% for consumer loans and 1.6% for small business loans over the three months, while net write-off rates slightly decreased for both segments. This data, which excludes loans held for sale, provides insights into the company’s credit performance and reflects the impact of various factors such as loan mix and seasonal variability.

The most recent analyst rating on (AXP) stock is a Hold with a $290.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on American Express stock, see the AXP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AXP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AXP is a Outperform.

American Express has a strong financial foundation with robust revenue and profit growth backed by efficient cash flow management. The technical analysis indicates short-term caution, and the valuation suggests a fair price compared to peers. Positive earnings call and corporate events further support the company’s future growth prospects despite macroeconomic uncertainties.

To see Spark’s full report on AXP stock, click here.

More about American Express

American Express Company operates in the financial services industry, primarily offering credit card products and services. It focuses on consumer and small business card member lending portfolios within the U.S. market.

International Consolidated Airlines ( (GB:IAG) ) has issued an update.

International Consolidated Airlines Group (IAG) announced that as of May 15, 2025, it holds 248,733,751 treasury shares, with the issued share capital excluding these treasury shares amounting to 4,722,742,259. This announcement has implications for shareholders, as it provides the necessary figures for calculating voting rights and determining the need to notify changes in shareholding to the Spanish National Securities Market Commission.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:IAG) stock is a Hold with a £1.85 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on International Consolidated Airlines stock, see the GB:IAG Stock Forecast page.

Despite attractive valuation, technical indicators suggest caution due to potential overbought conditions and high leverage. Overall, the outlook is positive with strong fundamentals, though industry volatility and external challenges may pose risks.

data.title: Exceed World Delays Q1 10-Q Filing
data.description:
Exceed World ( (EXDW) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Protect Your Portfolio Against Market Uncertainty

  • Discover companies with rock-solid fundamentals in TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter.
  • Receive undervalued stocks, resilient to market uncertainty, delivered straight to your inbox.

Exceed World, Inc. has announced a delay in filing its Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) for the financial period ending March 31, 2025. The primary reason for this delay is the ongoing process of finalizing the operating results, which could not be completed without unreasonable effort and expense. The company has assured that the Form 10-Q will be filed within the 5-day extension period allowed. There are no anticipated significant changes in financial results from the corresponding period of the previous year, and the company has made forward-looking statements regarding its compliance efforts. The notification was signed by Tomoo Yoshida, the Chief Executive Officer.

More about Exceed World

data.title: Ferronordic AGM 2025: Key Resolutions and Strategic Focus
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Quickly and easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Ferronordic AB ( (SE:FNM) ) has issued an announcement.

At Ferronordic’s 2025 AGM, key resolutions included the decision not to pay dividends and the adoption of the company’s financial statements. The meeting saw the re-election of board members and the appointment of Lars Corneliusson as the Board chairman. KPMG AB was re-elected as the auditor, and guidelines for executive remuneration were approved. These decisions reflect Ferronordic’s strategic focus on strengthening its governance and financial management, potentially impacting its market positioning and stakeholder relations.

More about Ferronordic AB

Ferronordic is a service and sales company specializing in construction equipment and trucks. It operates as a dealer for Volvo CE in parts of the United States, and represents brands like Hitachi, Sandvik, and Link-Belt in the same region. Additionally, Ferronordic is a dealer for Volvo Trucks and Renault Trucks in Germany, and Volvo CE in Kazakhstan. Founded in 2010, the company has 37 outlets and approximately 800 employees, with its shares listed on Nasdaq Stockholm.

Average Trading Volume: 10,276

Current Market Cap: SEK701.2M

City of London Investment Trust PLC ( (GB:CTY) ) has issued an update.

City of London Investment Trust PLC has announced the sale of 100,000 ordinary shares from its treasury at a price of 471.5p per share. This transaction impacts the company’s voting rights, with the total number of voting rights now standing at 32,917,489, which shareholders can use to assess their interest in accordance with FCA’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules.

However, technical indicators suggest potential price weakness, and limited cash flow transparency poses some risk. Recent corporate events show management’s confidence, but the technical analysis and cash flow opacity weigh more heavily on the overall score.

data.title: Eutelsat Communications Reports Mixed Revenue Results for Q3 2024-25
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Quickly and easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Eutelsat Communications ( (FR:ETL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Eutelsat Communications reported its third-quarter and nine-month revenues for the 2024-25 fiscal year, showing a slight decline in total revenues but confirming its financial objectives for the full year. The company experienced double-digit growth in its Connectivity segment, driven by LEO-enabled solutions, while facing challenges in the Video segment due to market trends and regulatory impacts. The report highlights strategic partnerships and expansions in the African market, as well as ongoing developments in multi-orbit connectivity solutions for aviation, showcasing Eutelsat’s efforts to maintain its competitive position in the satellite communications industry.

More about Eutelsat Communications

Eutelsat Communications is a prominent player in the satellite communications industry, providing video broadcasting and connectivity services. The company focuses on leveraging both GEO and LEO satellite technologies to deliver comprehensive solutions across various sectors, including government services and mobile connectivity.
